nasb.text: It extended northward and went to En-shemesh and went to Geliloth, which is opposite the ascent of Adummim, and it went down to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben.

esv.text: Then it bends in a northerly direction going on to En-shemesh, and from there goes to Geliloth, which is opposite the ascent of Adummim. Then it goes down to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,

cnv.text: 再轉向北，伸展至隱．示麥，去到亞都冥斜坡對面的基利錄，又下到流本的兒子波罕的磐石那裡；

ccb.text: 然后，向北先后到隐·示麦，亚都冥山坡对面的基利绿，吕便的儿子波罕所立的大石，
